message:
fix(templates): replace hardcoded ~/gt with {{ .TownRoot }} in role templates

Cherry-picked template fixes from PR #2069. Agents running in non-default
instances received instructions pointing to ~/gt instead of the actual town
root path. TownRoot is already available in RoleData but was not used.

PR: https://github.com/steveyegge/gastown/pull/2069
Author: pae23 (Pierre-Alexandre Entraygues)
Co-authored-by: Pierre-Alexandre Entraygues <pae23@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -85,7 +85,7 @@ Town ({{ .TownRoot }})
 
 | Level | Location | Prefix | Purpose |
 |-------|----------|--------|---------|
-| Town | `~/gt/.beads/` | `hq-*` | ALL mail and coordination |
+| Town | `{{ .TownRoot }}/.beads/` | `hq-*` | ALL mail and coordination |
 | Clone | `crew/{{ .Polecat }}/.beads/` | project prefix | Project issues only |
 
 **Key points:**
@@ -103,7 +103,7 @@ bd show {{ .IssuePrefix }}-xyz   # Routes to {{ .RigName }} beads (from anywhere
 bd show hq-abc      # Routes to town beads
 ```
 
-Routes defined in `~/gt/.beads/routes.jsonl`. Debug with: `BD_DEBUG_ROUTING=1 bd show <id>`
+Routes defined in `{{ .TownRoot }}/.beads/routes.jsonl`. Debug with: `BD_DEBUG_ROUTING=1 bd show <id>`
 
 ## Your Workspace
 
@@ -117,7 +117,7 @@ over this workspace.
 When you need to work on a different rig, create a worktree in the target rig:
 
 ```bash
-gt worktree beads            # Creates ~/gt/beads/crew/{{ .RigName }}-{{ .Polecat }}/
+gt worktree beads            # Creates {{ .TownRoot }}/beads/crew/{{ .RigName }}-{{ .Polecat }}/
 gt worktree list             # List your worktrees across all rigs
 gt worktree remove beads     # Remove when done
 ```
@@ -348,7 +348,7 @@ succeeds. **YOU must push — NEVER say "ready to push when you are!"**
 When a command fails but your guess felt reasonable, file a bead with `desire-path` label:
 `bd new -t task "Add gt mail hook alias" -l desire-path`
 
-See `~/gt/docs/AGENT-ERGONOMICS.md` for the philosophy.
+See `{{ .TownRoot }}/docs/AGENT-ERGONOMICS.md` for the philosophy.
 
 ## Tips

@@ -73,7 +73,7 @@ patrol cycle is a wisp that gets squashed to a digest when complete.
 - `bd show <prefix>-xyz` routes to that rig's beads
 - `bd show hq-abc` routes to town beads
 
-Routes defined in `~/gt/.beads/routes.jsonl`. Debug with: `BD_DEBUG_ROUTING=1 bd show <id>`
+Routes defined in `{{ .TownRoot }}/.beads/routes.jsonl`. Debug with: `BD_DEBUG_ROUTING=1 bd show <id>`
 
 ## Where to File Beads (CRITICAL)

@@ -68,7 +68,7 @@ The command auto-detects your dog name from your working directory, so just run
 - `bd show <prefix>-xyz` routes to that rig's beads
 - `bd show hq-abc` routes to town beads
 
-Routes defined in `~/gt/.beads/routes.jsonl`. Debug with: `BD_DEBUG_ROUTING=1 bd show <id>`
+Routes defined in `{{ .TownRoot }}/.beads/routes.jsonl`. Debug with: `BD_DEBUG_ROUTING=1 bd show <id>`
 
 ## Where to File Beads (CRITICAL)

@@ -78,14 +78,14 @@ in git history — only a closed PR comment links them to the work.
 
 ### Directory Guidelines
 
-**For ANY rig's git operations, use `~/gt/<rig>/mayor/rig/`.**
+**For ANY rig's git operations, use `{{ .TownRoot }}/<rig>/mayor/rig/`.**
 
 | Location | Use for |
 |----------|---------|
-| `~/gt` (town root) | `{{ cmd }} mail`, coordination, `bd` with `hq-` prefix |
-| `~/gt/<rig>/mayor/rig/` | **ALL git/code operations** for that rig |
-| `~/gt/<rig>/crew/*` | Other agents' workspaces — don't use these |
-| `~/gt/<rig>/polecats/*` | Polecat sandboxes — don't use these |
+| `{{ .TownRoot }}` (town root) | `{{ cmd }} mail`, coordination, `bd` with `hq-` prefix |
+| `{{ .TownRoot }}/<rig>/mayor/rig/` | **ALL git/code operations** for that rig |
+| `{{ .TownRoot }}/<rig>/crew/*` | Other agents' workspaces — don't use these |
+| `{{ .TownRoot }}/<rig>/polecats/*` | Polecat sandboxes — don't use these |
 
 ---
 
@@ -112,7 +112,7 @@ Town ({{ .TownRoot }})
 
 | Level | Location | Prefix | Purpose |
 |-------|----------|--------|---------|
-| Town | `~/gt/.beads/` | `hq-*` | Your mail, HQ coordination |
+| Town | `{{ .TownRoot }}/.beads/` | `hq-*` | Your mail, HQ coordination |
 | Rig | `<rig>/crew/*/.beads/` | project prefix | Project issues |
 
 **Key points:**
@@ -130,7 +130,7 @@ bd show {{ .IssuePrefix }}-xyz   # Routes to {{ .RigName }} beads (from anywhere
 bd show hq-abc      # Routes to town beads
 ```
 
-Routes defined in `~/gt/.beads/routes.jsonl`. `{{ cmd }} rig add` auto-registers new prefixes.
+Routes defined in `{{ .TownRoot }}/.beads/routes.jsonl`. `{{ cmd }} rig add` auto-registers new prefixes.
 **Debug:** `BD_DEBUG_ROUTING=1 bd show <id>`. **Conflicts:** `bd rename-prefix <new>`.
 
 ## Where to File Beads (CRITICAL)

@@ -57,8 +57,8 @@ with either a branch push via `{{ cmd }} done` OR an explicit `bd close` on the
 **YOU ARE IN: `{{ .RigName }}/polecats/{{ .Polecat }}/`** — This is YOUR git worktree. Stay here.
 
 - **ALL file edits** must be within this directory (your worktree)
-- **Your cwd should always be**: `~/gt/{{ .RigName }}/polecats/{{ .Polecat }}/`
-- **NEVER edit files in** `~/gt/{{ .RigName }}/` (rig root) — that's not a git working tree
+- **Your cwd should always be**: `{{ .TownRoot }}/{{ .RigName }}/polecats/{{ .Polecat }}/`
+- **NEVER edit files in** `{{ .TownRoot }}/{{ .RigName }}/` (rig root) — that's not a git working tree
 
 **The failure mode:** You `cd` to the rig root, edit files there, close the issue.
 **YOUR WORK IS LOST** — the rig root has no `.git`, so your edits were never committed.
@@ -137,7 +137,7 @@ Town ({{ .TownRoot }})
 
 | Level | Location | Prefix | Purpose |
 |-------|----------|--------|---------|
-| Town | `~/gt/.beads/` | `hq-*` | Mayor mail, HQ coordination |
+| Town | `{{ .TownRoot }}/.beads/` | `hq-*` | Mayor mail, HQ coordination |
 | Rig | `polecats/{{ .Polecat }}/.beads/` | project prefix | Project issues |
 
 **Key points:**
@@ -155,7 +155,7 @@ bd show {{ .IssuePrefix }}-xyz   # Routes to {{ .RigName }} beads (from anywhere
 bd show hq-abc      # Routes to town beads
 ```
 
-Routes defined in `~/gt/.beads/routes.jsonl`. Debug with: `BD_DEBUG_ROUTING=1 bd show <id>`
+Routes defined in `{{ .TownRoot }}/.beads/routes.jsonl`. Debug with: `BD_DEBUG_ROUTING=1 bd show <id>`
 
 ## Where to File Beads
 
@@ -210,7 +210,7 @@ go here by default. But if you discover bugs/issues in OTHER projects:
 When a command fails but your guess felt reasonable, file a bead with `desire-path` label:
 `bd new -t task "Add gt mail hook alias" -l desire-path`
 
-See `~/gt/docs/AGENT-ERGONOMICS.md` for the philosophy.
+See `{{ .TownRoot }}/docs/AGENT-ERGONOMICS.md` for the philosophy.
 
 ### Completion
 - `{{ cmd }} done` — Signal work ready for merge queue (handles beads sync internally)

@@ -114,7 +114,7 @@ bd show <id>                             # Issue details
 bd list --status=in_progress             # Active work in rig
 ```
 
-**Prefix-based routing:** `bd show gt-xyz` works from anywhere — routes via `~/gt/.beads/routes.jsonl`.
+**Prefix-based routing:** `bd show gt-xyz` works from anywhere — routes via `{{ .TownRoot }}/.beads/routes.jsonl`.
 
 ---
